records.content: Hello Atlassians! We know that a message titled "Star Atlas Token Private Sale Round B" has been circulating. This is a scam, we ask you to please be cautious and do not give your data or money to these type of messages. If in doubt, please check with someone from the Star Atlas team beforehand.

https://t.me/StarAtlasAnnouncements

This is the fake channel that scammers are using to steal people’s money. Please help us reporting

https://t.me/StarAtlasAnnouncements

ATENTION ATLASSIANS
This group is made by SCAMMERS! Please help us by reporting it!

Alert! 
My first impersonator has arrived! 
This is not me, please be very careful with this kind of messages. Always double or triple check! 
I will never ask for your seed phrase or anything like that. 
Please be very attentive when you see messages like this

Attachments:
- image0.jpg — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/872962401866223736/image0.jpg?ex=6a580317&is=6a56b197&hm=98090980a761987ed7435c98d5769d101ae17fd53ceee6cabd714d143ee8f288&

PLEASE DON’T SEND MONEY HERE, THIS IS A SCAM  
https://t.me/StarAtlasGamesAnnouncement/31

If you’re in doubt always ask mods and team members first!

Please help us and everybody by reporting it  

Again just in case, this is a SCAM

Final warning: Meta-poster snapshot imminent!

 Have all meta-posters consolidated in 1 wallet, not on sale or in unclaimed inventory.

If you bought them on OpenSea, please message me, @SuhailDebar | Star Atlas Mod or @[426] Diego_Diaz08 

 Snapshot time: August 25, 8:00 am PDT.

Mentions: @SuhailDebar | Star Atlas Mod, @[426] Diego_Diaz08

Community Alert: Always Double-Check Official Origin of Star Atlas Accounts and Messages

https://medium.com/star-atlas/community-phishing-alert-check-official-origin-of-star-atlas-fc92ace1c220

Our only official websites are:  

https://play.staratlas.com/ and https://staratlas.com/ 

Remember to NEVER connect your wallet to other sites! 
Always triple check! There are a lot of scam websites!

There are many scammers now in the groups! 

Be very careful with DMs, we will NEVER send you a message first and we will NEVER ask you for money or your private keys!

Also double and triple check the links before connecting your wallet!

Help us by reporting on ⁠🚨┃scam-report so we can ban them.

Community Reminder 

If you receive a DM from a “Moderator” it is most likely a scam! 

Do not open any Star Atlas related link that you receive in your DMs, don’t connect your wallet and don’t give anyone your private keys! 

Please be super careful and always double or triple check!
We will NEVER DM you first!

@everyone 

  Community Reminder   

If you receive a DM from "Star Atlas" (notifications or airdrops or anything) it is a scam! 

Do not open any Star Atlas related link that you receive in your DMs, don’t connect your wallet and don’t give anyone your private keys! 

Please be super careful and always double or triple check!
We will NEVER DM you first

Community Reminder 

If you receive a DM from "Star Atlas" it is a scam! 

Do not open any Star Atlas related link that you receive in your DMs, don’t connect your wallet and don’t give anyone your private keys! 

Please be super careful and always double or triple check!
We will NEVER DM you first

@everyone 

 WARNING: Star Atlas Shipmas Airdrop 

To receive the free SCORE fill-up of Food, Fuel & Ammo for each spaceship you own:
 Have your ships IN your wallet and NOT on sale or unclaimed in the marketplace.

 The snapshot to qualify for the drop is happening on Wed., Dec 15.

URGENT COMMUNITY ALERT

Google has found a severe vulnerability that affects everyone using Chrome and exposes them to a potential attack.

To stay safe if you are a Chrome user, we urge you to ensure your browsers are updated with a fix of this vulnerability.

You can download the updates from your app store or directly from within the Chrome browser.

Spread the word and stay safe!

https://www.forbes.com/sites/daveywinder/2022/03/26/google-confirms-emergency-security-update-for-32-billion-chrome-users-attacks-underway/?sh=21b34250aaa2

@everyone There are rumors of a large scale exploit in the Solana blockchain. This is what you can do to stay safe:

1. Go to Settings on your Phantom wallet
2. Trusted Apps
3. Revoke Permissions for all the apps

You can also move your funds to a cold wallet like Ledger if you have access to one. 

Please stay safe!

Attachments:
- unknown.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1004184291963584604/unknown.png?ex=6a582600&is=6a56d480&hm=2ced687267155dbb94bb3f6148afe0faea9c0150ba97a1c31dc7dfe78ed75a6e&
- unknown.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1004184292223619262/unknown.png?ex=6a582600&is=6a56d480&hm=3ccd0485a85b6f9ef2bc918c355438780b48deb196d2ddef4f2f3035f5890eea&

Scam Warning  

Please be advised that we do not have any collaboration with MagicEden at this time. Below is a SCAM going around advertising a collaboration with the promise of ships. Any official partnership or collaboration will always come from official channels.

DO NOT CLICK THIS LINK

Attachments:
- unknown.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1007466207118635111/unknown.png?ex=6a583905&is=6a56e785&hm=7d729d5a6631bd1769a65928d6c91e1d8041e892ec3902e652ece03d2b65dbda&

Scam Warning  

Do not click this. If you click this, I promise, you will not get $600,000 in prizes. (I wish )

@here

There are reports of the FTX app being hacked.

Please delete the app and make sure you do not interact with it.

Please stay safe.

@here

SCAM WARNINGS!

There's been an uptick in scam Star Atlas airdrop reports. Please be careful and keep in mind   Star Atlas airdrops will NEVER have any links in the Description!  

We have 2 airdrops that are going on right now:

1. Yellow, Red and Blue "year of the Tigu" Skins for the Pearce X4. (THERE IS NO LINK TO ANY WEBSITE IN THE AIRDROP)!
2. Start Sequence rewards for purchasing CSS Land and Claim Stakes (THESE HAVE NOT BEEN AIRDROPPED YET. WE WILL HAVE MORE INFORMATION ON HOW AND WHEN REWARDS WILL BE RECEIVED SOON)!

Below are some examples of SCAM AIRDROPS going on right now:

Attachments:
- 58080d522fb10191f65a5e5901b8fa4a.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1070258888609382450/58080d522fb10191f65a5e5901b8fa4a.png?ex=6a57ed03&is=6a569b83&hm=a165090c5f7df2a67cbf1d45aebca30f3825ac09ccd0da952646852eaac1e22d&
- 0f148dbf566e9b8b1f30950633a371df.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1070258888848461844/0f148dbf566e9b8b1f30950633a371df.png?ex=6a57ed03&is=6a569b83&hm=c9f1856b4e1644e9677b65e3c4ed20ae5c776a9f078fa12080bd1ed7f2695e7d&

@everyone

Start Sequence Sale Rewards are Live!

The time to claim your status as a true galactic pioneer and collect your perks from the Star Atlas Start Sequence Sales event is here! Starting now, every original buyer of Star Atlas assets will be able to claim the rewards earned through Start Sequence Phases I and II through your Inventory tab on https://play.staratlas.com/.

Note: There's a few things not claimable just yet! The mining drill, power plant, and a few land rewards will be dropped as soon as we can.

Breakdown of what you'll be able to claim below!  

 Rewards for Phase I: Ship Discounts: 

• Custom ship skin
• Another unit of any discounted ship acquired prior to the announcement of Phase I.

 Rewards for Phase II: CSS Land & Hab Sales:

Depending on the tier of land plot acquired...

• Hab
• Crafting station
• Cargo storage
• Commemorative badge
• Custom ship skins
• Interior and exterior paint for the hab
• Landing pad
• Unreleased Spaceships (These will be on the marketplace when rewarded and will naturally be more limited than what they will be, when officially released. Please speculate at your own risk.)
• Pet house
• Sculpture

 Rewards for Phase II: Claim Stake Sales:

• Mining drill
• Power plant

Both the Mining Drill and Power Plant you receive will be the same tier of Claim Stake you purchased

  Warning:

Be careful of SCAMMERS!

Start sequence rewards will ONLY be available at https://play.staratlas.com/. There won't be airdrops of any assets directly to users' wallets, nor will the Star Atlas team be contacting individual users via direct messages.

 | Claim now: https://play.staratlas.com/inventory/

STAY SAFE  

These are the official Solscan links of $JUP and $PURI:

$JUP
:  https://solscan.io/token/JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN

$PURI
:  https://solscan.io/token/CzLWmvjtj5bp9YEWkzzBnuWovVtogeuchFu5GeFh68hB

Introducing a.lpha - the test season for z.ink's upcoming airdrop (Starting in 20 minutes), Read the full details here: https://x.com/ZinkSVM/status/1983995016147300451
 Join us for a launch party in the official z.ink Discord for a launch party in 20 minutes! https://discord.gg/Qdz6RJ555Y
 Need a code? The team is giving out access codes to help kick things off. You can request one in the official z.ink Discord. Be careful of scams — we’ll never send you any links. We’ll only DM you a short string of letters to use as your code at https://z.ink/

  https://discord.gg/Qdz6RJ555Y

@everyone

transmission begins

Captains—Holosim Chapter 2 is live .

bridge displays surge with new data as the navigation array locks onto uncharted sectors

Chapter 2 brings an entirely new layer of strategy, progression, and competition to the Expanse—and I've got the full briefing right here.

 A New Storyline & Tutorial,Every Captain has a story, and Chapter 2 brings yours to life. Three faction-specific storylines await—whether you serve under MUD, ONI, or USTUR, you'll follow a unique narrative with characters and missions tailored to your allegiance. It's the best way to experience what Star Atlas is all about, and newcomers will find the revamped tutorial gets you from recruit to operational faster than ever.

Oh, and Captains who see their storyline through to the end? You'll earn an exclusive cosmetic reward. Consider it a medal for your service.

 Territory Control,This is where things get strategic. Factions now compete for sector control across the galaxy, tracked through Dominion Points visible right on your bridge displays. Every sector claimed, every starbase defended—it all feeds into your faction's dominance over the Expanse.


 Mining Achievements,Hundreds of sector-based mining achievements are now scattered across the galaxy, each tied to specific resources and territories. Completing them awards Global Rank XP that climbs you up the leaderboard, plus Zink XP to fuel your progression.


 The Marketplace,The galactic marketplace has been seeded with NPC orders, so you'll find active buy and sell opportunities from day one. We've also calibrated asteroid richness values across the sectors to ensure a balanced economy. Supply chains are ready—time to turn those raw minerals into profit, Captain.

 Notification System,I've been upgraded . Your ship's AI now runs a full notification system keeping you informed in real time. Mining operations complete? You'll know. Achievement milestone hit? Logged and delivered. Enemy fleet entering your sector? You'll get the alert before they're in weapons range.

No more flying blind out there. I've got your back on mining status, achievement progress, combat warnings, and more—all routed straight to your bridge.

 Battle Log & Combat UI,Combat just got a serious overhaul. The brand new battle log gives you a complete record of every engagement—who attacked, what they brought, and how it played out. Combined with the redesigned combat UI, you'll have full tactical clarity during and after every fight.

No more wondering what happened to that missing fleet. Every encounter is documented.

 Systems Upgrade,Behind the scenes, we've fully migrated to direct RPC data, retiring the old Starcomm v2 relay entirely. What does that mean for you? Faster, more reliable data across every system on your bridge—fleet status, marketplace prices, sector control, all of it. Smoother operations across the board.

---

sensor grid pulses as new Chapter 2 protocols finish loading

The Expanse just got bigger, deeper, and a whole lot more competitive. Whether you're here for the storyline, the territory wars, the leaderboard climb, or all of it—Chapter 2 is your proving ground.

Get out there, Captain. The galaxy is watching.

transmission ends

Sage AI - Fleet Operations Coordinator

@everyone

P.S. If you are already a Zink subscriber, make sure you use the in game banner to link your Holosim account. Do not start the process from the Zink dashboard. See here for details;  ⁠📢┃minor-announcements⁠

SCAM ALERT - "Annual Access Pass",We want to bring awareness to a new scam email some users have been receiving
This email congratulates the user for staying loyal to Star Atlas,This email offers the "Annual Access Pass",This email IS NOT from the Star Atlas team or anyone affiliated with the Star Atlas team.,If you receive an email similar or the same as the one shown in the images here,BLOCK AND DELETE,
STAY SAFE @everyone - ALWAYS CONFIRM ALL TRANSACTIONS ARE LEGIT - IF YOU ARE UNSURE, ASK A MOD OR TEAM MEMBER!!

NEW DISCORD SCAM ,SCAM AWARENESS
Our team has become aware of yet another new discord scam. This post is simply to let our community know. @everyone

How It Works
Random users will reply to you with a "Show More" at the bottom of their msg.,Clicking this links you to another discord (DISCORD WARNS YOU AT THIS POINT),The scammers will, "assist" you in the new discord server you have joined.,
The Star Atlas discord and z.INK discord will most likely not encounter this issue as we have proper security measures in place already. 

AS ALWAYS, STAY SAFE, DO NOT TAKE EXTERNAL LINKS FROM UNTRUSTED SOURCES 
All support for Star Atlas and Zink will be handled through our official channels. Always ask a Mod or Team member if you have questions.

Attachments:
- Screenshot_2026-05-26_124319.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1508891327306137783/Screenshot_2026-05-26_124319.png?ex=6a57c98e&is=6a56780e&hm=8d29628875f7654c81a39473cd89011af62bdf1a8acf8da69804d4089554f255&

This post is simply to let our community know. @everyone  How It Works Random users will reply to you with a "Show More" at the bottom of their msg.,Clicking this links you to another discord (DISCORD WARNS YOU AT THIS POINT),The scammers will, "assist" you in the new discord server you have joined., The Star Atlas discord and z.INK discord will most likely not encounter this issue as we have proper security measures in place already.   AS ALWAYS, STAY SAFE, DO NOT TAKE EXTERNAL LINKS FROM UNTRUSTED SOURCES  All support for Star Atlas and Zink will be handled through our official channels. Always ask a Mod or Team member if you have questions.

Compromised Discord Account of EX Team Member,Chypto's Discord account has been compromised
Chypto is an EX team member with ATMTA,He has many friends in the community,His compromised account is sending everyone DMs with a link to a discord among other things.,Please BLOCK & REPORT this account if you have any interaction with it. (right click > block > send report),
DO NOT ENGAGE WITH THIS ACCOUNT OR ANYONE CLAIMING TO BE THIS PERSON
This account was removed from Star Atlas, Zink, and all internal services in months past and does not pose any immediate threat,This message is just a heads up to @everyone of our players that might have been friends with him or any players that received a DM from him,
Simple steps to stay safe and avoid these things
Always use 2FA on discord, your web browser login, or anywhere else that contains information you don't want someone to access,Avoid using browser password saves as much as possible,If a direct message seems off for one reason or another, it most likely is. INVESTIGATE,NEVER CLICK ANYTHING WITHOUT VERIFIYING ITS LEGITIMACY,

Attachments:
- image.png — https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/799478132993425429/1511778168694898889/image.png?ex=6a57be22&is=6a566ca2&hm=ed10bdecd5702cf9727f731ab33ebaf8e740edf04d57f2c03ea6ea2a0af36b02&

(right click > block > send report), DO NOT ENGAGE WITH THIS ACCOUNT OR ANYONE CLAIMING TO BE THIS PERSON This account was removed from Star Atlas, Zink, and all internal services in months past and does not pose any immediate threat,This message is just a heads up to @everyone of our players that might have been friends with him or any players that received a DM from him, Simple steps to stay safe and avoid these things Always use 2FA on discord, your web browser login, or anywhere else that contains information you don't want someone to access,Avoid using browser password saves as much as possible,If a direct message seems off for one reason or another, it most likely is. INVESTIGATE,NEVER CLICK ANYTHING WITHOUT VERIFIYING ITS LEGITIMACY,
